sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Is Abbott (ABT) the Best Longevity Stock to Buy Now?
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is highlighted as one of the top longevity stocks, with recent announcements focusing on its advancements in diabetes care, including new data on diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) and the CE Mark for its dual glucose-ketone sensing technology, Libre Duo. Despite acknowledging ABT's potential, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer greater returns.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE): The Best Longevity Stock to Buy Now
feed.summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) has been highlighted as one of the best longevity stocks to buy, based on recent FDA approvals and promising clinical trial results. The company recently secured expanded FDA indications for Hympavzi to treat hemophilia and presented detailed Phase 2b results for its investigational GLP-1 receptor agonist, berobenatide, for diabetes. Additionally, Pfizer announced positive progression-free and overall survival results from its Phase 3 Breakwater trial.
